caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black sweatshirt sits in a studio setting. His sweatshirt features gold lettering that reads "BOSS TALK" and a small circular logo. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. In the background, a white wall displays the repeated gold text "ORIGINAL HUSTLE" accompanied by stars. A blue sign above the man reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the desk to the right, a container is visible with a red and white label that reads "BOSS TALK OUT". To the left, a smaller logo featuring a microphone and "BOSS TALK" is partially visible. Across the frames, the man remains in a seated position, slightly turning his head and shifting his facial expression while looking toward someone off-screen to his right.
